title: Gradual Redesign Rollout via Feature Flags
context: Need to develop new 'Santuário Terapêutico' design (Waves 0-12) without impacting regular users until design validation is complete
decision: Implement feature flag infrastructure with URL parameter (?redesign=1) and localStorage to toggle between neon/cyberpunk and new design, CSS scoped under [data-redesign='true']

title: Environment-Aware Logger to Reduce Console Noise
context: Dashboard console was noisy with debug logs during development
decision: Implement environment-aware logger that suppresses debug output in production

title: Groq Prompt Caching Optimization Strategy
context: Chatbot was making redundant Groq API calls across web and Telegram interfaces
decision: Implement unified prompt caching layer to optimize Groq API usage

title: Structured Logging for Telegram Bot Debugging
context: Telegram bot debugging was difficult due to lack of structured logs
decision: Implement structured JSON logging for Telegram bot to aid debugging and monitoring

title: Add Therapeutic Class Field to Medicines
context: Medical professionals requested ability to categorize medicines by therapeutic class for better clinical management
decision: Add therapeutic_class field to medicine forms and schema

title: Claude Code GitHub Actions Integration
context: Need automated code review and validation in GitHub Actions
decision: Integrate Claude Code GitHub Actions workflow for automated validation

title: Wave-Based Redesign Incremental Delivery
context: Complete design overhaul required for better UX and modern aesthetics (Santuário Terapêutico concept)
decision: Break redesign into 15 waves, each delivered incrementally with feature flags to enable gradual rollout

title: Design System Hierarchy: Tokens → Typography → Components → Layouts
context: Need structured design system foundation to ensure consistency across redesign waves
decision: Implement four-level design system: W0 (Design Tokens), W1 (Typography/Icons), W2 (Surface/Layout), W3 (Component Primitives)

title: CSS Scoped Design Token System
context: Need ability to run both old and new design systems in parallel during migration
decision: All redesign tokens scoped under CSS attribute selector [data-redesign='true'], allowing coexistence of old/new styles

title: Gradual Color Palette Transition (Neon → Health-Focused)
context: Original cyberpunk/neon aesthetic is not aligned with healthcare mission
decision: Transition primary colors: neon → #006a5e (health green), add clinical blue #005db6, implement Material Design 3 surface hierarchy

title: Typography Stack: Public Sans (Display) + Lexend (Body)
context: Need modern, readable typography that works well for medical information display
decision: Use Public Sans for displays/headlines and Lexend for body/labels, loaded via CSS @import

title: No Sharp Borders: Minimum 0.75rem Border Radius
context: New design aesthetic requires softer, more approachable appearance
decision: All UI elements have minimum 0.75rem border radius, card elements use --radius-card: 2rem

title: Shadow System: Ambient Shadows Over Neon Glows
context: Neon glow effects are visually jarring for a healthcare app
decision: Replace neon glows with Material Design 3 ambient shadow system (--shadow-sm/md/lg CSS variables)

title: Feature-Based Architecture Over Layer-Based
context: Improving code organization and maintainability
decision: Organize code by feature (src/features/*) rather than by layer (src/components, src/hooks, src/utils)

title: Medicines View: Consultation Mode with Read-Only Interface
context: Users need ability to review medicines during consultations without modifying data
decision: Implement consultation mode in medicines view with read-only interface and modal presentation

title: Calendar-Driven History Navigation
context: Users need fast way to navigate historical medication data
decision: Implement calendar-driven history view for quick navigation to past entries

title: Profile Hub: Centralized User Data Management
context: User profile was scattered across multiple views
decision: Create unified Profile Hub component as central location for user data and account management

title: Stock Levels System: Four-Tier Threshold Model
context: Need clear visual indicators for medication stock levels
decision: Implement four-tier stock system: CRITICAL (<7 days), LOW (<14 days), NORMAL (<30 days), HIGH (≥30 days)

title: PDF Report: Clinical Consultation Format
context: Users need to generate clinical reports for consultations
decision: Implement PDF generation for clinical consultation reports with standardized format

title: Separate Stock Purchases from Inventory Tracking
context: Stock purchases and inventory tracking had conflicting logic
decision: Separate purchases and inventory into distinct domains with independent data models

title: InstallPrompt Always Renders in Sanctuary Mode (Unconditionally)
context: InstallPrompt (PWA install banner) behavior should be independent of redesign flag because new users arrive via landing page and see sanctuary design first
decision: Render InstallPrompt with sanctuary colors unconditionally (no redesign selector), hardcoded #006a5e instead of var() fallback

title: LLM Responses Forbidden from Using Markdown Syntax
context: Chatbot rendering could support markdown, but simpler approach: constraint the LLM to never generate markdown symbols
decision: Forbid LLM from using markdown in prompt instructions; render plain text with <em> tags for emphasis instead of implementing markdown parser

title: No Font Weights Below 400 (Elderly Accessibility)
context: App serves elderly patients (geriatric use case) who cannot read thin/light fonts
decision: Map all light/thin/extralight font weights to 400 (regular). No font weights below 400 ever rendered, ensures WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for readability

title: Lucide-React Icons Always Paired with Text Labels
context: Icons alone are insufficient for accessibility; elderly users may not recognize icon meanings
decision: Every icon rendered must have accompanying text label explaining its purpose. No standalone icons without aria-label or visible text

title: Bot Architecture Must Mirror Web App Services
context: Telegram bot had silently diverged from web app stock management logic, causing bugs in FIFO restoration
decision: Bot must use identical RPCs and services as web app. No client-side logic duplication. Audit weekly for drift between bot and web code paths
